product_overview: ClassTrack is a biometric-first attendance and classroom management web application that integrates student portal access, instructor/admin authentication, real-time attendance tracking, and class management backed by Supabase and Next.js.
core_goals: Provide fast, secure access to student attendance records for instructors, admins, and students.
Enable reliable biometric-driven attendance capture and real-time updates to the instructor dashboard.
Offer role-based class management and student directory features while enforcing departmental isolation and row-level security.
Keep the web experience responsive and resilient with clear error handling for authentication and offline scenarios.

features.name: Student Login (SIN-based)
features.description: Allow students to access their personal portal and attendance history by submitting their Student Identification Number (SIN).
user_flows: Navigate to /student/portal -> Enter SIN "22-00555" -> Submit SIN -> See personal attendance summary and recent records
Navigate to /student/portal -> Enter invalid SIN "000-00000" -> Submit SIN -> See error indicating SIN not recognized

features.name: Admin / Instructor Login
features.description: Authenticate instructors and administrators using email and password to access protected dashboards and management pages.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email "adminme@engineering.edu" -> Enter password "adminme123" -> Submit login form -> See /dashboard with instructor/admin privileges
Navigate to /login -> Enter email "adminme@engineering.edu" -> Enter incorrect password -> Submit login form -> See authentication error and remain on /login

features.name: Attendance Tracking
features.description: View and manage attendance records with filtering and search; receives live updates from kiosks and backend events.
user_flows: Navigate to /attendance -> Filter attendance by date -> Search for a specific student -> See filtered attendance records and live updates
Navigate to /attendance -> Not authenticated or session expired -> See authentication required notice and be redirected to /login

features.name: Class Management
features.description: Browse and inspect classes; instructors can open class details to review rosters and recent attendance activity.
user_flows: Navigate to /classes -> View list of classes -> Open class details for a selected class -> See class roster and recent attendance
Navigate to /classes -> Search or open a class that does not exist -> See no class details found or no results message

routes.description: Landing page or root entry point
Main dashboard for instructors and admins

features.name: Student Login
features.description: Access the student portal using a Student Identification Number (SIN)
user_interactions: Enter SIN "22-00555" in the input field
Click Submit or Enter to access the portal
